creator: k-a-z@dezernat.eu
text:
Hello!

I'm running into a bunch of already fixed problems with
pandoc 2.7.2 on 12.1-RELEASE-p2 using latest packages.

So, could you update
 - hs-pandoc to 2.9.2
 - hs-pandoc-citeproc to 0.17

and possibly package pandoc-crossref:
 - https://github.com/lierdakil/pandoc-crossref

please?


Many thanks in advance for your time and work!


--
K.A.
